description: This document model describes a work breakdown structure as a way to keep track of a hierarchy of goals that are achieved through direct action by the owner or through task delegation. A work breakdown structure can be blocked if it requires additional input from stakeholders to be completed.
name: Work Breakdown Structure

modules.description: Operations for managing goal documentation, notes, and draft status
modules.name: documentation

operations.description: Updates the description of a goal to reflect new requirements or understanding
operations.name: UPDATE_DESCRIPTION

operations.description: Updates the instructions for completing a goal with detailed steps or requirements
operations.name: UPDATE_INSTRUCTIONS

operations.description: Adds a note to a goal with optional author attribution for tracking comments and progress
operations.name: ADD_NOTE

operations.description: Clears all instructions from a goal when they are no longer relevant
operations.name: CLEAR_INSTRUCTIONS

operations.description: Removes all notes from a goal to reset its comment history
operations.name: CLEAR_NOTES

operations.description: Removes a specific note from a goal by its ID
operations.name: REMOVE_NOTE

operations.description: Sets the isDraft flag to true.
operations.name: MARK_AS_DRAFT

operations.description: Sets the isDraft flag to false.
operations.name: MARK_AS_READY
SET_OWNER

modules.description: Operations for managing goal relationships and dependencies
modules.name: hierarchy

operations.description: Moves a goal to a new position in the hierarchy by changing its parent or sibling order
operations.name: REORDER
operations.schema:
input ReorderInput {
  goalId: OID!
  "Omit for root goals"
  parentId: OID
  "Omit for appending at the end"
  insertBefore: OID
}

operations.description: Adds dependencies that must be completed before this goal can be started
operations.name: ADD_DEPENDENCIES

operations.description: Removes specified dependencies from a goal to adjust task relationships
operations.name: REMOVE_DEPENDENCIES

modules.description: Operations for managing goal lifecycle, delegation, and status transitions
modules.name: workflow

operations.description: Creates a new goal in the hierarchy with status TODO, or status DELEGATED if the assignee is set.

errors.description: A goal with the specified ID already exists
errors.name: DuplicateGoalIdError

operations.name: CREATE_GOAL
operations.schema:
input CreateGoalInput {
  id: OID!
  description: String!
  instructions: InitialInstructionsInput
  draft: Boolean
  parentId: OID
  insertBefore: OID
  assignee: String
  dependsOn: [OID!]
  initialNote: InitialNoteInput
  metaData: MetaDataInput
}

input InitialInstructionsInput {
  comments: String!
  workType: WorkType
  workId: String
  contextJSON: String
}

input InitialNoteInput {
  id: OID!
  note: String!
  author: String
}

input MetaDataInput {
  format: MetaDataFormat!
  data: String!
}

operations.description: Delegates a goal to an assignee who works on it and puts it IN_REVIEW
operations.name: DELEGATE_GOAL

operations.description: Report on a delegated goal by adding a note and optionally moving it IN_REVIEW. Only valid for goals with status DELEGATED.
operations.name: REPORT_ON_GOAL

operations.description: Marks a goal as IN_PROGRESS and propagates this status up to all ancestor goals to reflect active work in the subtree
operations.name: MARK_IN_PROGRESS

operations.description: Marks a goal as COMPLETED. All unfinished child goals (those not COMPLETED or WONT_DO) are automatically marked COMPLETED as well
operations.name: MARK_COMPLETED

operations.description: Marks a goal as TODO. If parent goals are COMPLETED or WONT_DO, they are also reset to TODO to maintain hierarchy consistency
operations.name: MARK_TODO

operations.description: Reports a goal as blocked indicating it requires stakeholder approval, input, or its dependencies need to be resolved in order to proceed.
operations.name: REPORT_BLOCKED

operations.description: Unblocks a goal by providing the required input to proceed.
operations.name: UNBLOCK_GOAL

operations.description: Marks a goal as WONT_DO. All unfinished child goals (those not COMPLETED or WONT_DO) are automatically marked WONT_DO as well
operations.name: MARK_WONT_DO

modules.description: Operations for managing external references and structured metadata
modules.name: metadata

operations.description: Sets external reference URLs for the entire work breakdown structure
operations.name: SET_REFERENCES

operations.description: Sets structured metadata for the work breakdown structure in various formats (TEXT, JSON, or OTHER)
operations.name: SET_META_DATA

global.schema:
type WorkBreakdownStructureState {
  owner: String
  isBlocked: Boolean!
  goals: [Goal!]!
  references: [URL!]!
  metaData: MetaData  
}

type Goal {
  id: OID!
  status: GoalStatus!
  block: GoalBlockReason
  parentId: OID
  dependencies: [OID!]!
  description: String!
  isDraft: Boolean!
  instructions: GoalInstructions
  notes: [Note!]!
  assignee: String
  outcome: MetaData
}

type GoalBlockReason {
  type: GoalBlockType!
  comment: String
}

enum GoalBlockType {
  AWAITING_APPROVAL
  MISSING_INFORMATION
  UNFINISHED_DEPENDENCIES
  OTHER
}

type GoalInstructions {
  comments: String!
  workType: WorkType
  workId: String
  context: MetaData
}

enum WorkType {
  SKILL
  SCENARIO
  TASK
}

type MetaData {
  format: MetaDataFormat!
  data: String!
}

enum MetaDataFormat {
  TEXT
  JSON
  OTHER
}

type Note {
  id: OID!
  note: String!
  author: String
}

enum GoalStatus {
  "Waiting statuses"
  TODO
  BLOCKED

  "Active statuses"
  IN_PROGRESS
  DELEGATED
  IN_REVIEW

  "Finished statuses"
  COMPLETED
  WONT_DO
}
